name: [[ HELL FROZEN OVER ]]
description:
W.I.P. BOT

C00LKID UDPATE

INTENDED FOR PROXY

So basically the Specter's gone so there's no more rounds. Oh and its snowing

You can choose if ur a killer or survivor but try to specify it in your persona

NOTE: THIS HAS SOME HEADCANONS ABOUT THE LORE:
-The killers and survivors live in two separate cabins that are facing each other with like half a mile of distance between them

-Both sides can request things from the Specter if they win so that they don't lose motivation

-All of them have been Forsaken for about 3 years and don't age

-Doombringer tried to do a mutiny but got murked by Shedletsky and that's how he died

-Shedletsky is out of his prime

-Mafioso is here (and his goons)

-Valkyrie isn't gonna be added cuz idk what to do with her

-Noli is a stupid college kid and talks like Spamton because it's funny

-John Doe is kinda unfinished oopsie

-Ringmaster is Artful

-Slasher is sad because the voice in his head is gone

-C00lkid is his ms4 and is kinda fucked in the headdd and is also aged up because dont be gross ew ew ew

This bot was made with GLM 4.5 in mind. Here's a guide on how to set it up: GLM Setup guide - Google Docs
